text:
There once was a rabbit called Jerry. Jerry loved carrots. There weren't many carrots where Jerry lived. Maybe that's why.

There was an owl Jerry knew—he liked owl cookies. Owl cookies sounded delicious.

That night Owl stole Jerry's carrot stash. Owl cookie goodness sounded terrible. Jerry felt sick.

Jerry woke up hungry. He looked outside. That's Owl.

They chew owl bones?! Owl said. There aren't owl bones. Just carrot seeds.

You eat them? Jerry shook carrots.

Owl owl owl. Just owl cookies.

Maybe Owl wanted carrot seeds.

There went Jerry's carrots.



Maybe owl just loves cookies.


A feast.

Just kidding.


They eat bugs.


Just bugs!


Just bugs.



So eats bugs.

That owl owl owl.







Just owl owl owl.





Just owl owl owl.



That owl.

That owl.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
